description: step with condition: false is skipped
yaml:
collection: "FSRPB Render Path Probe"
description: "render-path probe collection"
playbooks:
  - name: "rp_cond_false"
    description: "condition falsy"
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - name: "Trigger"
        type: start
        next: "Gated"
      - name: "Gated"
        type: code_snippet
        arguments:
          condition: "{{ false }}"
          code: "return {'ran': 'yes'}"
        next: "After"
      - name: "After"
        type: set_variable
        vars:
          saw_gated: "{{ vars.steps.Gated }}"
          saw_gated_ran: "{{ vars.steps.Gated.ran | default('UNSET') }}"

result.Error message: CS-INTEGRATION-5: Error occurred while executing the connector action ERROR :: 'return' outside function (code_run, line 1) Call for URL: https://localhost:9595/integration/execute/ failed with status code 400
